Subject.Data: You have been summoned to Sleepy Joezzz

Text.Data:
Hey Dillon,

You're in the Sleepy Joezzz fantasy football league.

Your team: Dillons Demons
Draft: Wednesday, August 26

Log in at https://sleepiez.thoughtfire.studio — pick your name, enter dshambaugh1@gmail.com, check your email for the code, and you're in.

The first challenge (2010s Pop & Indie trivia) is live NOW. Six weeks of trivia determine the draft order. The better you do, the better your pick.

Also David says hi and that you owe him $5 from 2019. Just putting that out there.

— The app (not David, the app sent this)

P.S. Yes this is a real email from a real app. We built this for the homies.
